name: reviewed-data-pipeline-profile
_comment: Reviewed BCM usage evidence for the governed AWS data pipeline (us-east-1). Replace usageAccountId with YOUR account, and replace the amounts with YOUR reviewed monthly quantities. serviceCode/usageType/operation below were verified against the AWS Price List catalog (aws pricing get-products) on 2026-07-02 (Glue/S3/Athena) and 2026-07-04 (KMS/CloudWatch) — S3 standard storage and KMS/CloudWatch all have an EMPTY operation in the catalog, and Glue job runs bill under operation Jobrun. Ready for: python core/cost/bcm_pricing_calculator.py run --report-dir <dir> --usage-profile <this file>.
